$comment: Rule of Five caps + canonical unique-bonus list. Each bonus value caps at 5 stacks. Populated initially from community knowledge; cross-check against data/mids/database/EnhancementSets.json once Lane A is harvested.

rule_of_five.rule: Any single numeric set-bonus value caps at 5 stacks across the entire build.
examples: 5x +7.5% Recharge from LotG global → 6th gives nothing.
5x +5% Recharge from set 5-piece bonuses (e.g. Decimation 4-piece) cap independently of LotG.
5x +1.88% S/L Defense from Decimation 2-piece cap independently of any other 1.88% bonus.
rule_of_five.stacking_strategy: Mix sets that grant the same aspect at different values. e.g. recharge: 5x LotG (+7.5%) + 5x 5%-rech bonuses + 5x 6.25%-rech bonuses + 5x 7.5%-rech bonuses (different sources).

common_global_recharge_bonuses.source: Luck of the Gambler: Defense/Increased Recharge Speed (the LotG +Rech global)
Numerous 4-piece set bonuses across most damage/utility sets

common_unique_globals.$comment: Each unique global may be slotted only once per build. They give large, easy bonuses.

Power_Transfer_Chance_for_Self_Heal.effect: ~10%/activation chance to heal a small amount

Reactive_Defenses_Scaling_Damage_Resista.effect: Up to +9% Resist scaling as HP drops

common_LotG_mules.$comment: Powers good for slotting one LotG +Rech global as a 1-slot mule. Stack up to 5 across the build.

$populate_from_canonical: Run tools/regen-bonus-stacking.ps1 (TODO) once data/canonical/boost_sets/*.json is in place to enumerate every set bonus value across the dataset for the diff/spotcheck workflow.
